title: Huski Champagne Flute | New | Award-Winning Design with Detachable Stem | Premium Stainless Steel Champagne Glass with Lid | Triple Insulated Tumbler | 240ml Capacity | Great Gift (Champagne)
features: AWARD-WINNING DESIGN - New York Product Design Awards Gold 2024, Best Design Finalist Winner 2024. UK Design Patent 6342985 (pending).

KEEPS WINE CHILLED TO THE LAST DROP - Triple insulated to keep your bubbly sparkling and perfectly chilled for longer. Double walled, vacuum insulated and copper lined. Seamless design made with premium 304 stainless steel.

GO STEMMED OR STEMLESS - Seamlessly switch between stemmed elegance and stemless convenience with the detachable TwistLock Stem. Fits 240ml of your favourite Champagne, Prosecco, mimosa, cocktail or sparkling wine.
NO CONDENSATION, SURFACES PROTECTED - Stay-dry design keeps hands and tables dry. Non-scratch base pad and TwistLock Stem protects surfaces from damage. No need for coasters.
